name.en-US: Little Office of the Suffering Christ, the Finding, and the Exaltation of the Holy Cross

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of Suffering Christ, the Finding, and the Exaltation of the Holy Cross, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US: From Devota Et Fructuosa Pietatis Exercitia Deum Triunum Adorandi (1751).
